Alpha links to its mutual partner [[Beta]] and points readers at
[[Gamma#Introduction|see Gamma notes]] for background.

It also references an as-yet-uncatalogued [[Ghost]] asset, and disambiguates a
basename collision with an explicit qualifier: [[archive/Delta]].
